title: magnolia zotictla
intro: Magnolia zotictla is a species of flowering plant in the family Magnoliaceae, native to Mexico, and is also known as the "Mexican Evergreen Magnolia" or "Totonac Magnolia." It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal compounds. The health benefits of Magnolia zotictla include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Magnolia zotictla include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the flowers or leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
